description: Triggers for discovering installed skills, agents, MCPs, and plugins

queries.query: Show me all installed skills and agents available to me
What plugins and MCP servers do I have?
Scan my environment and give me a catalog of everything available
What skills can I use in this project?
List all the AI tools installed on my system
What agents are available for me to run?
Discover all MCP servers configured in this repository
What resources do I have access to for research tasks?
Show me what's installed globally vs locally in this repo
I want to see all available capabilities before I start my task
Write a Python script to sort a list
Help me prepare for my job interview
Explain how Kubernetes works
Write a marketing email for our product launch
Design a database schema for my application
Summarize this YouTube video
Help me write a cover letter
Create a product roadmap for our SaaS
Optimize this SQL query for performance
Build an ABX marketing strategy
